LAW AND MOTION 302, MITEK INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT - RULING - A R G U E D. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT RULES AS FOLLOWS: MITEK INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Defendant'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):

Sophie A.M. Lockey, in propria persona, Plaintiff.

Michael Vasquez, WOOD, SMITH, HENNING & BERMAN LLP, (707) 559-6750, for Defendant Mitek, Inc.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Mitek Inc.'s "motion to strike punitive damages from plaintiff's complaint" is denied. The complaint asserts facts that are sufficient to support punitive damages at the pleading stage.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Defendant'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Continued To Jun-01-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MITEK INC.'s Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiff'S Complaint

Appearances:
Sophie Lockey, self-represented plaintiff, Tel:628.866.8925, appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearances.

Plaintiff requested that the court consider her untimely opposition and explained the reason why it was filed late. The Court accepted her explanation and ordered:

DEFENDANT MITEK INC.'s Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiff's Complaint is continued to June 1, 2023 at 9:30am in Department 302. Defendant may file its reply no later than May 24, 2023.

The clerk shall give notice to defendant of the continued hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

****************************************

After hearing, the defendant was notified by the clerk of the new hearing date by email.
